overview.description: The Vanguard Total Inflation-Protected Securities ETF (VTP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of US Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) with at least one year remaining in maturity. VTP was launched on Jul 7, 2025 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: ICE BofA US Treasury Inflation Linked Bond

data.title: 3 Great New ETFs From 2025
data.text: These exchange-traded funds offer promising new takes on old ideas.
